textByHashes.c24c51c0bd2f115683cae6a7f8991b5b737da122: Hey you, why don't you have a game of Runedraw with me? If you've got 25 gold pieces I've got a bag of runes we can use.
textByHashes.f2c1493a2e3247ccdcb245d0a0776274556c3517: How about another game? I'll pay you back with the winnings.
textByHashes.b0027b634a886d31192150f5530572a6c7cc1cd3: Er ... we'll deal with that when we come to it.
textByHashes.9eb85f0753801e2132031c8613d0c0d8d27caed8: Err ... how about another game? We can settle up after we've finished playing.
textByHashes.ef95023bf66848ccfc6c2750ca82d47aa2c5154e: Please don't do that!!! They will suck the life from my bones!!!
textByHashes.f24dd3508fd16caf36e8b38965636311a47c4056: Two players take turns to draw a rune from a bag, which contains ten runes in total. Each rune has a different value: an air rune is worth one point, up to a Nature rune which is worth nine points.
textByHashes.3f05b8d027d702c0958c712e705c35b8c06ca902: If a player draws the Death rune then the game is over, and they have lost.
textByHashes.054420235d743fb75ccf11363bf9f3aa2c0d4bbb: A player can choose to hold if they wish and not draw any more runes, but this runs the risk of the other player drawing more runes until they have a greater points total and win.
textByHashes.2f6f6e548549e8c6611bd88adf2d1f38e9176ded: Do you want another game of Runedraw?
textByHashes.f872e10b7385ceee1dc723628801219a1dabdc99: Well it's about time. Run along now, I need some Robin time.
textByHashes.837941030b49a73f0e57fd5a377f8397a11b3732: Leave me be, peasant - I am relaxing.
textByHashes.0151035e354c1d6caab7bfde40833500d5da2f79: Do you know who I am?
textByHashes.9e891b7270093ead3c2c9d3327888f806c08aa93: I, peasant, am Robin, Master Bowman. I am very famous you know.
textByHashes.d65f0e1c550f1c5601ed4b9bbb5c5df0e746d47e: So have you heard of me?
textByHashes.0a13c940e168435f77a38ff36fddab24d3f1499a: Would you do me a favour? I appear to have run out of bed linen. Can you run along to the innkeeper and get me a clean bedsheet?
textByHashes.8941657134227c44bafd13558648e6b51a86c927: Now that sounds more like it. Run along now, get me my sheet.
textByHashes.249e842390af52e8e3e096103884db848dd0b222: Oh charming. You just can't get the staff these days.
textByHashes.741394295658617bef6a54b50228ee02c57e560d: Sorry, my orders are that I can only give slime to those who have completed the Morytania medium, hard or elite diaries.
textByHashes.cdb6a8bd1d44646ea1c3bf893a8e360cae43eb35: There's a diary master in Canifis, go and speak to her.
textByHashes.a64b71b56453f198b6c7c3ea5dfc32819545cb64: You do not have enough space for both bonemeal and slime. Come back to me when you have space.
textByHashes.e52e3b7034dac9fdb1ebbb4c608285c071e26894: You do not have any bones for me to convert for you.
textByHashes.9f800d2cbe1e843f401200e33959cf03c2ff577d: As THE Master Bowman, I am quite impressed by your equipment, but it's not the sort I'd recommend myself. Try more conventional forms of accuracy enhancement.
textByHashes.4c865d38efcf222d6ce8b12549d4536f9c2e6669: As THE Master Bowman, I am most impressed by your equipment, peasant.
